_description: MacFitz manual split overrides for Barry's Cheltenham 2026 competition
_strategy: MacFitz follows Surebet EXCEPT where a near-tie justifies a different selection. Overrides are keyed by exact race_name from CheltenhamPicks DynamoDB.
_note: Races with gap <= _auto_split_threshold where no manual override exists will be flagged as NEW_CLOSE_CALL in the HTML regen log but NOT auto-split without human confirmation.

Pertemps Handicap Hurdle.reason: LIVE SPLIT 12/03/2026: Skelton two-runner race — Supremely West (3/1, H.Skelton) is hammered as stable target; Ace Of Spades (16/1, K.Woods) drifted back after early support. SureBet follows market on Supremely West (D symbol, ran here Oct 2025, 2lb less today, proven progressive handicapper). MacFitz holds Ace Of Spades EW at 16/1 in 6-place Pertemps (C winner, soft/heavy-ground qualifier Jan 2026). Classic Skelton two-hander: back the first string (SW) for points, keep the longer-odds C/D specialist (AOS) for EW coverage.

JCB Triumph Hurdle.reason: DAY4 SPLIT FINAL 13/03/2026: SB=Minella Study (101, small yard). MacFitz=Highland Crystal (6/1-8/1, Elliott/Kennedy). DEEP FORM ANALYSIS: Highland Crystal beat Saratoga at Naas (heavy, Feb 7) — Saratoga then WON the Fred Winter on Tuesday at this Festival. That is live Festival-level form franking, the strongest in the race. 3/3 unbeaten, won Newbury Listed fillies' in November, controlled Naas win. Selma De Vary (prev pick) ran 2nd to Narciso Has who is ABSENT/INJURED — form unverifiable. Maestro Conti Grade 2 win: One Horse Town 2nd is 25/1 today = weak form. Minella Study: beaten by Wolf Rayet (200/1 today) in prep = deflated form. Highland Crystal's Saratoga connection is the only fully-frankable form line in this race — better value at 6/1+ than Selma at 15/4.

County Handicap Hurdle.reason: DAY4 SPLIT 12/03/2026: SB=Absurde (64, CD winner 2024, OR 155) — but last hurdles run was April 2025 Plumpton, since then Melbourne Cup on Flat (Nov 25). Coming in cold with no hurdles prep this season in a 26-runner handicap cavalry charge — big concern. MacFitz=Bowensonfire (Kennedy/Elliott, D symbol, back-to-back Leopardstown wins off OR 132→140, rapidly progressive, form 333211 last 6 — momentum horse at likely 12/1+). 6 EW places — ideal for a progressive in-form handicapper. Absurde held as SB for the class/CD angle.

St James's Place Hunters' Chase.reason: DAY4 SPLIT 12/03/2026: DB model=Chemical Energy (92pts, C) but not in top market contenders. SB=Wonderwall (4/1, CD winner — WON this race 2025, defending champion, Curling stable, goes well fresh after Nov point win).
